description: Recommended-canon tokens for the physical quality (component of fitness / biomotor ability) a Session or Block develops (§5.3/§5.4, R20). A descriptive classification axis orthogonal to `disciplines` (the activity) and `intent` (the purpose): the same squat is `strength`, `power`, or `muscular_endurance` depending on how it is prescribed, so the quality is not reliably derivable and is carried explicitly. Open set (§5.9): a quality with no token here is carried namespaced or opaque and still round-trips. Seed spans the ACSM health-related and skill-related components plus the modern strength-and-conditioning vocabulary. One Session/Block MAY develop several.

tokens.label: Cardiorespiratory Endurance
tokens.description: Sustained whole-body aerobic capacity (the classic ACSM health-related component).

tokens.label: Anaerobic Capacity
tokens.description: High-intensity work tolerance above threshold (glycolytic capacity).

tokens.label: Muscular Endurance
tokens.description: Ability of a muscle group to sustain repeated/long contractions.

tokens.label: Hypertrophy
tokens.description: Muscle cross-sectional growth (an adaptation goal apps commonly tag as a quality).

tokens.label: Power
tokens.description: Rate of force development / force × velocity (jumps, throws, Olympic lifts).

tokens.label: Agility
tokens.description: Rapid whole-body change of direction / reactive movement.

tokens.label: Balance
tokens.description: Maintaining the centre of mass over the base of support (static/dynamic).

tokens.label: Stability
tokens.description: Resisting unwanted movement / controlling a joint or the trunk under load (planks, Pallof, anti-rotation).

tokens.label: Mobility
tokens.description: Active, controlled range of motion under the body's own power (CARs, end-range control, FRC).

tokens.label: Flexibility
tokens.description: Passive range of motion at a joint (static / PNF stretching; the ACSM health-related component).

tokens.label: Coordination
tokens.description: Smooth, efficient multi-segment movement / inter-limb timing.

tokens.label: Reaction Time
tokens.description: Latency from stimulus to movement (skill-related component).

tokens.label: Work Capacity
tokens.description: General capacity to perform and recover from total training work (conditioning).
